Purpose: Registry of all repositories in the constellation with tier and remote metadata.

Key Columns: file_id; vm_node_id; file_path; object_kind; invariant_codes; metrics_codes
Purpose: Manifest of all tracked files, linking them to repos, relative paths, and invariant/metric schema codes.

Key Columns: file_node_id; file_id; object_kind; cic; aos; det; uec; arr; cdl
Purpose: Represents each file as a graph node with its invariant and metric snapshot for blast and neighbor analysis.

Key Columns: edge_id; source_file_node_id; target_file_node_id; neighbor_scope; distance; det_delta; hvf_alignment; edge_kind
Purpose: Defines edges between file nodes, carrying deltas and alignment scores that quantify their relationship.

Key Columns: blast_profile_id; vm_node_id; neighbor_scope; max_distance; max_neighbors; det_cap; uec_target; arr_target
Purpose: Stores policy-driven limits on blast radius per VM node, enforcing safety caps and engagement targets over neighbor sets.
